_comment: P20 pre-commit hook config. Each entry enforces that every call site of <function> passes <required_param>. Add new entries when a function gains a parameter. The hook greps staged .py files for call sites and fails if any caller omits the required param.
_format: function = method name to check (e.g. 'add_evidence'); required_param = keyword arg that must be present; file_glob = which files to scan; exclude_glob = patterns to skip (test files, docstrings, different-method false positives)

checks._earned_from: C-002: 0 of 27 callers passed content_hash (Round 79 wiring fix)
C-002: 0 of 3 callers passed content_hash (Round 79 wiring fix)

_p6_check._comment: P6: no bare 'except.*pass' in staged .py files. The hook greps for 'except.*:' followed by 'pass' on the next line.
